belier.intro: The Moon has crossed into Pisces, now in your twelfth house, and the waning gibbous light at 92 percent draws your attention inward after several days of outward momentum. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue their patient work in your own sign, but this Piscean Moon adds a softer, more dreamlike quality to whatever you have been building. The Leo Sun in your fifth house keeps warmth available even in retreat.
belier.love: A quiet feeling about someone you care for surfaces more easily today than it would under a louder sky. Let tenderness lead instead of certainty.
belier.work: Behind-the-scenes preparation serves you better today than bold action. Trust that groundwork done quietly still counts.
belier.energy: Your fire banks low today, more ember than flame. Rest is productive, not a delay of productivity.
belier.intuition: The twelfth house Moon sharpens your access to symbols and dreams. A recurring image deserves your attention rather than dismissal.
belier.mantra: I trust the quiet work happening beneath the surface.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces in your eleventh house today, softening your focus from personal ambition toward friendship and shared vision. Saturn and Neptune retrograde continue in your twelfth house, still dissolving old fears in private, while this new lunar placement invites genuine connection rather than networking. The Leo Sun in your fourth house keeps home a steady anchor.
taureau.love: A friend's perspective on your relationship carries unusual warmth and accuracy today. Let their care in, rather than only their opinion.
taureau.work: A collaborative or community-oriented project benefits from your quiet reliability today. You do not need to lead loudly to matter here.
taureau.energy: Your earth element finds this watery Moon calming rather than destabilizing. Time near water, literal or figurative, restores you.
taureau.intuition: Your sense of which friendships are genuinely nourishing sharpens today. Trust the person whose company leaves you lighter.
taureau.mantra: I let genuine connection replace obligation.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon enters Pisces in your tenth house today, bringing a softer, more compassionate quality to questions of career and public direction. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eleventh house continue refining which goals genuinely matter, now with a gentler emotional undertone. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps everyday communication lively even as bigger professional questions soften into something more feeling-based.
gemeaux.love: A partner's support for your ambitions shows itself in a quieter, less verbal way today. Notice the gesture rather than waiting for the words.
gemeaux.work: A professional decision benefits from asking how it feels, not only how it looks. Let intuition weigh in alongside strategy today.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy softens into something more receptive today, well suited to listening rather than presenting.
gemeaux.intuition: Your sense of the emotional undercurrent in your career path is unusually accessible today. Notice what you feel before you analyze it.
gemeaux.mantra: I let feeling inform my next professional step.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces in your ninth house today, a warmly compatible water sign that expands your sense of meaning and possibility. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your tenth house continue restructuring your definition of success, now with more emotional generosity available to the process. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps your worth steady as your horizons widen.
cancer.love: A conversation about shared beliefs or future plans flows more easily today than usual. Let optimism have room alongside practicality.
cancer.work: A bigger-picture question about your career path benefits from today's expansive, hopeful mood. Consider possibilities you had ruled out too quickly.
cancer.energy: This Piscean Moon harmonizes beautifully with your own watery nature. Use the ease to recover fully rather than pushing through it.
cancer.intuition: Your sense of meaning and purpose is unusually accessible today. Trust the direction that feels expansive rather than merely safe.
cancer.mantra: I let hope widen what I believe is possible.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon enters Pisces in your eighth house today, deepening emotional and psychological territory after several days focused on partnership. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your ninth house continue testing inherited beliefs about commitment, now with a more compassionate undertone. The Sun in your own sign keeps you warm and generous even as deeper currents ask for attention.
lion.love: Emotional intimacy deepens today in ways that go beyond words. A shared silence with someone you trust may say more than a conversation would.
lion.work: A shared resource or joint financial matter benefits from a compassionate, patient approach today rather than a forceful one.
lion.energy: Your fire softens into something more reflective today. Let yourself feel rather than perform feeling.
lion.intuition: Your instincts about what is emotionally true in a close bond are unusually deep today. Trust what surfaces even if it is complicated.
lion.mantra: I let intimacy deepen without needing to control it.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces directly opposite your Sun today, in your seventh house, bringing partnership dynamics into softer, more compassionate focus. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your eighth house continue dissolving illusions around shared resources, now with more emotional nuance available. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps private feeling active beneath the surface of any partnership conversation.
vierge.love: A relationship benefits today from softness rather than analysis. Let yourself be less precise and more present with someone you care about.
vierge.work: A professional partnership or negotiation goes more smoothly with empathy leading the way today rather than pure logic.
vierge.energy: This watery Moon opposite your earth Sun asks you to loosen your usual precision. A little imperfection today is genuinely fine.
vierge.intuition: Your read on a partner's unspoken needs is unusually accessible today. Trust the feeling over the checklist.
vierge.mantra: I meet others with softness instead of precision.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon enters Pisces in your sixth house today, bringing a gentler, more compassionate quality to daily routines and health matters. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your seventh house continue testing whether a partnership rests on real respect, now with more emotional texture available. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendship warm as your daily rhythm softens.
balance.love: A small act of daily care for a partner means more today than a grand gesture would. Notice the quiet ways devotion shows itself.
balance.work: A work routine benefits from more flexibility and less rigid structure today. Let the day flow rather than forcing it into a plan.
balance.energy: Your air element finds this water Moon soothing today, a good day for gentle movement like stretching or a slow walk.
balance.intuition: Your body offers subtle signals about what serves you today. Listen to fatigue and hunger as information, not inconvenience.
balance.mantra: I let my daily rhythm soften and flow.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces in your fifth house today, a deeply compatible water sign that brings creativity and romance into warmer, more intuitive focus. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your sixth house continue dissolving illusions about daily habits, now alongside a more playful, generous mood. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps professional matters visible even as personal joy takes center stage.
scorpion.love: Romantic connection deepens through shared creative or imaginative activity today. Do something together that has no practical purpose at all.
scorpion.work: A creative project benefits enormously from today's intuitive, less structured mood. Let inspiration lead rather than forcing an outline.
scorpion.energy: This Piscean Moon harmonizes with your natural depth today, making emotional expression feel easier than usual.
scorpion.intuition: Creative and romantic intuitions flow especially freely today. Follow the impulse that feels like play rather than obligation.
scorpion.mantra: I let joy and creativity lead the way today.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon enters Pisces in your fourth house today, softening your attention toward home and emotional foundations after days focused elsewhere. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your fifth house continue asking which creative pursuits deserve real commitment, now with tender undertones. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps larger beliefs warm as your private world asks for gentle attention.
sagittaire.love: A quiet moment at home with someone you love carries more weight today than any grand outing could. Let simplicity be enough.
sagittaire.work: Working from home, or handling domestic matters alongside professional ones, flows more easily today than usual. Let both coexist without guilt.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire finds unusual comfort in stillness today. A slow morning or a restful evening serves you better than constant motion.
sagittaire.intuition: Feelings about home and family surface more easily today than usual. Trust the quiet emotional signal over the practical checklist.
sagittaire.mantra: I let home be a source of quiet renewal today.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces in your third house today, softening communication and everyday thinking with more intuitive, less linear quality. Saturn, your ruling planet, retrograde in your third house as well keeps precision available even as feeling enters the conversation. The Leo Sun in your eighth house keeps shared resources a live topic as your daily exchanges turn gentler.
capricorne.love: A conversation with someone close benefits from warmth over efficiency today. Let the exchange wander rather than steering it toward a conclusion.
capricorne.work: Written or verbal communication flows more intuitively today. Trust the version that feels emotionally honest over the one that is merely correct.
capricorne.energy: Mental energy is softer and more associative today, well suited to brainstorming rather than finalizing.
capricorne.intuition: Your instincts about the emotional subtext of a conversation are unusually sharp today. Notice what is meant beneath what is said.
capricorne.mantra: I let my words carry warmth as well as precision.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon moves into Pisces in your second house today, softening your relationship to money and self-worth after last week's intense Full Moon in your own sign. Pluto retrograde continues its deep transformation of identity from your first house, while this new placement brings feeling rather than analysis to material questions. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in your third house keep thought precise even as value feels more fluid today.
verseau.love: A conversation about shared resources benefits from emotional honesty today rather than spreadsheets. Say what security actually means to you.
verseau.work: Your sense of your own worth softens into something more intuitive today. Notice what feels fair rather than only what is negotiable.
verseau.energy: After last week's intensity, this gentler Moon offers real relief. Let today be restorative rather than another peak.
verseau.intuition: Your feelings about money and security are unusually accessible today. Trust the discomfort or ease you notice around a specific number.
verseau.mantra: I let my sense of worth be felt, not just calculated.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today, a homecoming that brings unusual clarity and comfort after days moving through other territory. Saturn and Neptune retrograde, with Neptune ruling you directly, continue their long work from your twelfth house, but today's lunar placement makes you feel unusually at ease in your own skin. The Leo Sun in your sixth house grounds you in routine even as your identity feels especially vivid.
poissons.love: You are unusually attuned to your own feelings today, which makes you more available to a partner rather than less. Share what you notice.
poissons.work: Intuitive decisions serve you particularly well today. Trust the choice that feels right even without a fully logical explanation.
poissons.energy: This Moon in your own sign restores you deeply. Let today include something that simply feels good, without justification.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is at its most naturally strong today, undiluted by other influences. Trust it fully in matters that concern only you.
poissons.mantra: I feel most myself when I trust what I feel.
poissons.author: Sibylle
